title: Command Cockpit Node Halos
summary: Quest board cells now carry compact proof, gate, crew, trail, score, and next-move medals.

verification.intent: Make current proof, blockers, progress, and next moves visible on path nodes without adding another scroll row.
verification.layout: The medals are absolutely positioned inside each Quest field cell and compressed on mobile.
verification.motion: Each medal uses a small transform-only sweep over a generated local texture.
